title: Top M.Tech Power System Engineering College in Noida
content: M.Tech Power System engineering programme aims at training graduate engineers in the field of Power Systems. It deals with issues at the intersection of electric power, economics and management of power and provides professional knowledge in power generation, transmission and distribution, and power equipment. NOTE-Classes will be held in the Evening and on Saturdays & Sundays 01 Acquire knowledge of power systems to identify, analyze, design and solve complex emerging problems in the field of power system engineering. 02 Acquire technical competencies in the area of power system engineering to pursue higher studies. 03 Engage in life-long learning through independent study and research. 01 To independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems 02 To write and present a substantial technical report/document 03 To demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program 04 To function effectively as an individual or as a member or leader in a team 05 To keep abreast with state of art technologies through lifelong learning 01 02 Acquire technical competencies in the area of power system engineering to pursue higher studies. 03 Engage in life-long learning through independent study and research. 01 Analyze, solve complex problems and meet the challenges face by the industry in power systems domain.
